subject: Pyroar, a large lion Pokemon with a prominent flaming mane, rearing in an aggressive fire-lit pose
description: A full-grown lion Pokemon rears up in an assertive, aggressive stance against a backdrop of swirling fire and warm light. The creature has a powerfully built body with a large, dramatic flame-wreathed mane that radiates outward — orange and red fire framing its face and upper body. Its posture is confrontational, weight back on its haunches with front limbs raised, conveying dominance and raw power. The environment is engulfed in warm fire tones — the background is almost entirely orange and red flame or heat haze, with little environmental detail beyond the fire itself. This is a clear evolutionary counterpart to Litleo, depicting the mature predator form.
foreground: large lion Pokemon rearing in aggressive stance with flaming mane
background: swirling fire and heat haze, predominantly orange and red
